Kernel-based Minimal Distributed Charges: A Conformationally Dependent ESP-Model for Molecular Simulations

Authors: Eric Boittier, Kai Toepfer, Mike Devereux, Markus Meuwly

Journal: Journal of Chemical Information and Modeling (2024)

DOI: 10.1021/acs.jctc.4c00759
